final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: must be horizontal PPT cover layout with title zone and speaker attribution
Subject: must include the financing announcement context as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, high-stakes investment atmosphere — exact tone balance is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "奥特曼" (as speaker name)
Constraints: must conform to domestic Chinese roadshow conventions and GP tone expectations
Avoid:
